metadata.name: Explain New Feature from Release Notes

description: A customer calls asking for more details about a new feature they saw mentioned in the latest release notes.

nodes.task_description: Ask the customer which new feature they are interested in.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the feature in question.

nodes.task_description: Access the internal documentation and training materials for that new feature.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews the internal guide for the feature.

nodes.task_description: Explain the purpose, benefits, and basic usage of the new feature to the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer understands the new feature and how it can help them.
